response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of solid full-stack software engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated production GenAI delivery, vector databases, RAG architectures, and cloud-platform AI system design at the depth a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role demands. Python is not listed in skills, and customer-facing technical-leadership experience is not evident.
strengths: 13+ years software engineering with TypeScript/Node.js and polyglot breadth
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) production experience
Python absent from skills; AI work appears infrastructure/tooling rather than shipped GenAI solutions
No evident customer-facing discovery or Staff-level technical leadership with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Missing core GenAI/RAG/vector DB production experience
Recent MCP and agentic-workflow tooling work
No Python or major cloud AI platform depth shown
